title: Marigold Tulips
description: Replaces the orange tulip with the marigold!
body:
## Marigold Tulips

Brings the marigold to vanilla Minecraft!  

This simple resource pack retextures the orange tulip into the marigold!  
It's perfect for players who want marigolds but don't want to play modded, want marigolds everywhere they go, or want to enjoy a new look.  
  
🌼 Vanilla-like design  
🌼 No mods required – just a resource pack **(Marigolds everywhere you go!!)**    

Marigold Tulips should look exactly like the Marigolds from Marigolds:)  
![Potted Marigold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CiixC4xj/images/ea7fe53b3faf8f05d9d21afd016547e12f59fd7b.png)

Find more images here: https://modrinth.com/mod/marigolds/gallery
